## RuntimeContext.resolveFillingSlots() method

Resolves filling slots to runtime objects.

**Signature:**

```typescript
resolveFillingSlots(slots: ReadonlyArray<IFillingSlot> | undefined): ReadonlyArray<IResolvedFillingSlot> | undefined;
```
